arts.ttl: Man Utd risk Sir Alex Ferguson's wrath again as transfer history could repeat itself
arts.sum: Reports linking Alejandro Garnacho with a move away from Old Trafford could leave Sir Alex Ferguson fuming due to the Scotsman proclaiming the youngster as the 'future' of Manchester United

arts.ttl: Pundit Predictions for Manchester United v Southampton 16 January 2025
arts.sum: But I think in this two [last] games it was more about the passion, the desire and everything, about how much you want to win the game. Everyone is really aware what he demands from us positioning-wise and tactical wise, I think we’re getting to the level that he wants on effort, running, passion and desire to win games.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand launching Manchester United investigation after failed transfer
arts.sum: Lucas Bergvall has been one of Tottenham's most consistent performers this season, having arrived last summer despite having trials with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Maguire is Man Utd leader again - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim says former club captain Harry Maguire is "a leader again."

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho's transfer dilemma as text message offers warning to Man United star
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has emerged as a Napoli target, though the Manchester United star should think twice about a move there considering who their manager is

arts.ttl: Analysis: Amorim's new midfield helping Man Utd to turn a corner
arts.sum: Man Utd's new head coach will also have seen how effective Mainoo and Ugarte are from transitions, or ball carries that instigate fast-paced attacks. Mainoo and Fernandes instigated Lisandro Martinez ’s opening goal at Anfield by pressing Liverpool with determination in the right-back area.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund 'ramp up interest' in Marcus Rashford after selling Donyell Malen to Aston Villa... but 'another Premier League star is top choice' over the Man United wantaway
arts.sum: Rashford, 27, admitted in a bombshell interview last month that he is ready to leave his boyhood club, and he has not played under Ruben Amorim since.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim substitutions could signal changing of the guard at Manchester United
arts.sum: Man Utd have two home games this week and they should be aiming to take six points off Southampton and Brighton.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has already issued warning which makes a Kobbie Mainoo Man United exit unthinkable
arts.sum: Kobbie Mainoo has been linked with a move away from United but he has become integral to Ruben Amorim's side

arts.ttl: Shock claim as Manchester United now ‘aim to get €50m’ from transfer – Would be a collapse
arts.sum: It is now well-known that Napoli are interested in Manchester United’s Alejandro Garnacho. Initially, it was reported the Red Devils want a fee of around €70m for the Argentine.
